title: Cryptoasset Reporting Framework: reporting of UK resident cryptoasset users
body: "The Cryptoasset Reporting Framework requires UK-based reporting cryptoasset service providers (RCASPs) to report tax-relevant information regarding their non-UK cryptoasset customers to HMRC.  This measure requires RCASPs to also report this tax-relevant information regarding their UK cryptoasset customers.  "
